records.title: Use GitHub as the external laboratory memory
Adopt the fixed continuity read protocol
Git as the structured decision and audit memory
Structural producer-consumer relationships between independent projects
Close the initial Symphonie Codex skill cycle before canonical migration to MammothSkills
Register Waypoint as a referenced app concept
Canonicalize the continuity read order with structured state first
Approve Symphonie UX/UI Architect Alpha.6 with recorded historical evidence limitation
Create a dedicated canonical repository for the Symphonie workflow
Approve the Symphonie Phase 0 model as an experimental baseline v0.1
Consolidar el repositorio Symphonie, su idioma canónico y la arquitectura documental de memoria gobernada
Endurecer el gobierno del LAB con contrato v2 y continuidad estructurada
Establecer independencia analítica y reevaluación objetiva de decisiones
